comments.body: Note you also must add @Honny1 with (write?) permissions to this repo in the github settings to make him an actual "collaborator", ref https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/569#issuecomment-3253416801

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *inknos*, *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,inknos] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Note you also must add @Honny1 with (write?) permissions to this repo in the github settings to make him an actual "collaborator", ref https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/569#issuecomment-3253416801

right, actually I believe he needs to be added to `podman-py-maintainers`, do you have perms? 

cc @baude

> > Note you also must add @Honny1 with (write?) permissions to this repo in the github settings to make him an actual "collaborator", ref [#569 (comment)](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/569#issuecomment-3253416801)
> 
> right, actually I believe he needs to be added to `podman-py-maintainers`, do you have perms?

Yes I added him there, adding him to the team makes the most sense certainly.
